<?php /** @var string $type */ /** @var string $content */ [$bgBadgeColor, $bgBadgeText] = match ($type) { 'INFO' => ['blue', 'INFO'], 'ERROR' => ['red', 'ERROR'], }; ?> <div class="my-1"> <span class="ml-2 px-1 bg-<?php echo $bgBadgeColor ?> font-bold"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($bgBadgeText) ?></span> <span class="ml-1"> <?php echo htmlspecialchars($content) ?> </span> </div>
